chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6044 of 2024 Abdul Rasheed Mallah Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order son CMA 26804/24 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.03.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Petitioner and his counsel were called absent on the last date of hearing without information. Same is the position today. It seems that they have lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
